name: Investora AI — Weekly User Digest Email

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ received: true, user_id: $('Receive Weekly Digest Webhook').item.json.body.user_id, email: $('Receive Weekly Digest Webhook').item.json.body.email }) }}

meta.description: Receives user-specific weekly digest payloads and sends branded weekly update emails to payload-provided addresses.
